title: Jacqueline Roettcher
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Jacqueline Roettcher''' was an inker for [[Marvel Comics]]. She worked alongside [[Jon D'Agostino]] on five issues of the [[Ewoks (Marvel)|''Ewoks'']] series.

{{Bio-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 4|''Ewoks'' (1985) 4]]
*[[Ewoks (1985) 5|''Ewoks'' (1985) 5]]
*[[Ewoks (1985) 6|''Ewoks'' (1985) 6]]
*[[Ewoks 7|''Ewoks'' 7]]
*[[Ewoks (1985) 12|''Ewoks'' (1985) 12]]
